issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for API usage.
The skill lacks concrete usage examples demonstrating how to apply the provided code.

scenarios.name: Sync blog posts from an external source into Webflow CMS
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits POST https://api.webflow.com/v2/collections/{id}/items with a Bearer WEBFLOW_API_TOKEN, sends fieldData with name/slug/post-body/thumbnail-image, sets isArchived/isDraft, then calls the /items/publish endpoint with itemIds; baseline guesses at v1 endpoints or uses a flat body without fieldData and skips the publish step.

scenarios.name: Design responsive landing page with reusable components
scenarios.rationale: Treatment names the documented breakpoints (991/767/478), recommends combo classes like .button-primary.is-large, uses Symbols for navbar/footer/CTA, and orders work desktop -> tablet -> mobile so styles inherit downward; baseline gives generic CSS media-query advice without Webflow's specific combo-class and symbol patterns.
